## Problem

<!-- What is wrong or missing? Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Impact

<!-- Who does it affect, and how? -->

## Evidence

<!-- Tests, command output, or a reproduction showing the change works. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally
- [ ] Tests cover the change; the core still runs without network access
- [ ] No business/product domain logic added to the harness (golden rule)
- [ ] No new dependency, or the pull request justifies it
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits and carry no AI attribution
- [ ] Any table with user data carries `tenant_id`
